title: hemizonia fasciculata subsp. typica
intro: Hemizonia fasciculata subsp. typica, also known as California tarweed, is a flowering plant species native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hemizonia fasciculata subsp. typica include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
